Bash(ssh root@76.13.17.91 "docker exec andaralab-backend-1 node -e \\"const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('/data/analisis.json'\)\); const f=\(obj,path=''\) => { if\(typeof obj !== 'object' || !obj\) return; for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(obj\)\) { if\(typeof v === 'string' && v.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('katalog'\)\) console.log\(path,k,v\); f\(v,path+'.'+k\); } }; d.forEach\(ds => f\(ds\)\); console.log\('done'\);\\"")

Bash(ssh root@76.13.17.91 "docker exec andaralab-backend-1 node -e \\"const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('/data/pages.json'\)\); const f=\(obj,path=''\) => { if\(typeof obj !== 'object' || !obj\) return; for\(const [k,v] of Object.entries\(obj\)\) { if\(typeof v === 'string' && v.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('katalog'\)\) console.log\(path,k,v\); f\(v,path+'.'+k\); } }; d.forEach\(ds => f\(ds\)\); console.log\('done'\);\\"")

Bash(ssh root@76.13.17.91 "docker exec andaralab-backend-1 node -e \\"const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('/data/datasets.json'\)\); const gdp=d.find\(x=>x.title==='Indonesia GDP Growth Rate'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(gdp,null,2\)\);\\"")

Bash(ssh root@76.13.17.91 "docker exec andaralab-backend-1 node -e \\"const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('/data/analisis.json'\)\); const find=\(obj,path=''\) => { if\(typeof obj !== 'object' || !obj\) return; if\(obj.title && obj.title.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('katalog'\)\) console.log\(path, obj.title\); if\(obj.widgets\) obj.widgets.forEach\(\(w,i\) => find\(w, path+'.widgets['+i+']'\)\); if\(obj.sections\) obj.sections.forEach\(\(s,i\) => find\(s, path+'.sections['+i+']'\)\); }; d.forEach\(ds => { ds.sections && ds.sections.forEach\(s => find\(s, ds.title+'.'\)\); }\);\\"")

Bash(ssh root@76.13.17.91 "docker exec andaralab-backend-1 node -e \\"const fs=require\('fs'\); const f=\(name,data\) => { let found=false; const search=\(obj,path=''\) => { if\(typeof obj !== 'object' || !obj\) return; if\(typeof obj === 'string' && obj.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('katalog'\)\) { console.log\(name,path,obj\); found=true; } Object.entries\(obj\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => search\(v,path+'.'+k\)\); }; search\(data\); if\(!found\) console.log\(name+': not found'\); }; [fs.readFileSync\('/data/'+f\) for f of ['datasets.json','analisis.json','pages.json','posts.json','featured-insights.json']];\\"")

Bash(ssh root@76.13.17.91 "docker exec andaralab-backend-1 node -e 'const fs=require\(\\"fs\\"\); const files=[\\"datasets.json\\",\\"analisis.json\\",\\"pages.json\\",\\"posts.json\\",\\"featured-insights.json\\"]; files.forEach\(f => { try { const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(\\"/data/\\"+f,\\"utf8\\"\)\); const search=\(obj,path=\\"\\"\)=>{if\(typeof obj!==\\"object\\"||!obj\)return;if\(typeof obj===\\"string\\"&&obj.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(\\"katalog\\"\)\)console.log\(f,path,obj\);Object.entries\(obj\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>search\(v,path+\\".\\"+k\)\);};search\(d\); } catch\(e\){} }\);'")
